summary: Tested absent lectures auto-marking and admin override features. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified showing orange 'غائب' badge, stats bar with absent count, and 'إعادة جدولة' admin override button for absent lectures.
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation verified correct: STATUS_LABELS includes 'absent' with orange color #ff9800
Admin override button visible only for admin role (user?.role === 'admin')
Backend auto-absent logic checks status_override flag before auto-marking as absent

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All absent UI elements verified: orange badge, غائب label, إعادة جدولة button, stats bar

seed_data_creation: Used existing test lecture 699fe4d6b319e3f8dd24c099 for status override tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Absent lectures feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/lectures/{course_id} auto-marks past scheduled lectures as 'absent' (with status_override check), PUT /api/lectures/{lecture_id}/status allows admin to override status (sets status_override: true). Frontend: course-lectures.tsx shows 'غائب' status with orange badge (#ff9800), admin sees 'إعادة جدولة' button to reschedule absent lectures. Schedule.tsx also displays absent status correctly. Test course: 698e54c5b17b90bf5c4205fe, Test lecture: 699fe4d6b319e3f8dd24c099.
